leagueBriefing: The 2026 World Baseball Classic reached a fever pitch as pool play wrapped up with major implications. Italy delivered the stunner of the tournament by toppling the star-studded United States, while Japan polished off a perfect 4-0 run behind a late power surge. Canada kept its quarterfinal dreams alive in a rain-soaked thriller, and Israel bid farewell to the tournament with a pride-restoring victory over the Netherlands.

games.headline: Murakami grand slam caps Japan's perfect pool play run
games.brief: Japan finished Pool C with a perfect 4-0 record, but for seven innings, the Tokyo Dome was on edge. Electrician-turned-pitcher Ondrej Satoria and the plucky Czech squad kept the defending champions scoreless through seven frames. The dam finally broke in the eighth when Japan erupted for nine runs, punctuated by Munetaka Murakami's first home run of the tournament—a towering grand slam that signaled the slugger's return to form just in time for the quarterfinals.
bullets: Munetaka Murakami broke his tournament slump with a massive eighth-inning grand slam.
Czech starter Ondrej Satoria silenced the Japanese bats for 4.2 innings with a fastball barely touching 80 mph.
Ukyo Shuto ignited the nine-run eighth inning with a three-run home run.
Japan's pitching staff combined for a two-hit shutout, led by Yumeto Kanemaru's winning relief effort.
Japan finishes pool play 4-0 and now heads to Miami for the knockout stage.
games.context: Japan clinches the top spot in Pool C and heads to Miami to face the Pool D runner-up in the quarterfinals.

highlights.title: Czechia VS. Japan 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Gelof and Mervis lead Israel to parting victory over Netherlands
games.brief: Though both teams were already eliminated from advancing, Israel made sure their 2026 WBC exit was a memorable one. Trailing 2-1 heading into the sixth, Israel's bats woke up for a five-run outburst. Jake Gelof and Matt Mervis provided the heavy lifting with clutch RBI hits, allowing Israel to finish the tournament with a respectable 2-2 record and secured their place in the next World Baseball Classic without needing to qualify.
bullets: Jake Gelof delivered the go-ahead two-run single during a decisive five-run sixth inning.
Matt Mervis added a two-run double to provide insurance for the Israeli bullpen.
The Netherlands took an early 2-0 lead in the first behind RBIs from Xander Bogaerts and Didi Gregorius.
Israel pitcher Ben Mallitz earned the win with a scoreless relief appearance.
Israel finishes third in Pool D, ensuring automatic qualification for the 2029 WBC.
games.context: Israel finishes the tournament 2-2, while the Netherlands ends a disappointing campaign at 1-3.

highlights.title: Israel vs. Netherlands 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Canada edges Puerto Rico in rain-delayed thriller to keep dreams alive
games.brief: In a game twice interrupted by tropical downpours in San Juan, Canada ground out a massive 3-2 victory over the hosts to set up a win-and-in scenario. Canada took advantage of Puerto Rico's uncharacteristic lack of control, scoring two runs on bases-loaded walks in the third. Brock Dykxhoorn then slammed the door with three dominant innings of relief to silence the partisan crowd and move Canada to the brink of its first-ever quarterfinal appearance.
bullets: Canada scored twice in the third inning on consecutive bases-loaded walks by Rico Garcia.
Owen Caissie continued his torrid tournament, going 2-for-3 with two doubles to push his average to .545.
Nolan Arenado drove in both runs for Puerto Rico but was held in check during the final frames.
Jordan Balazovic earned the win with three gritty innings, allowing just one hit.
Brock Dykxhoorn secured the save with three perfect innings, striking out one.
games.context: Canada can clinch its first-ever WBC quarterfinal berth with a win over Cuba on Wednesday.

highlights.title: Canada vs. Puerto Rico 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Azzurri stunner: Italy topples star-studded Team USA in massive upset
games.brief: In what will be remembered as one of the greatest upsets in WBC history, Italy stunned a United States roster filled with MLB All-Stars. Behind a brilliant start from Michael Lorenzen and a barrage of early home runs from prospects Kyle Teel and Sam Antonacci, the Italians built a shocking 8-0 lead. A furious late rally by the Americans, led by two Pete Crow-Armstrong homers, fell just short when Aaron Judge struck out with the tying run at the plate in the ninth.
bullets: Michael Lorenzen dominated his MLB peers, tossing 4.2 scoreless innings to earn the win.
Italy's 6-7-8 hitters (Teel, Caglianone, and Antonacci) went a combined 6-for-8 with three home runs.
Pete Crow-Armstrong sparked a late U.S. surge with two home runs and four RBIs.
U.S. captain Aaron Judge represented the tying run in the ninth but struck out to end the game.
The loss leaves Team USA's advancement in jeopardy, pending the result of Italy vs. Mexico.
games.context: The U.S. no longer controls its own destiny and needs an Italy win over Mexico to guarantee advancement.

highlights.title: Italy vs. United States 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights
